什么？王烁要搞人工智能？于是，人工智能概念股崩盘了。
什么？王烁要进军宇宙，搞航空公司？nasa发函：我们和前沿科技抗争到底！不死不休！
于是，nasa解散了。
新京日报：“战舰制造业和空间旅游业已成为拉动经济增长的新马车！”
湛江新报：“机动装甲工业作为新兴行业正在蒸蒸日上！”
华中社：“前沿集团又一次成为全球科技先锋！当之无愧的民营科技企业典范！”
“我这一生，就是步入哪个行业，就会给那个行业带来不可挽回损失的一生。”
王烁言。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bdf7fecf915621e6ddaa4de7fabbc0a6","author":"怪味花生豆","author_id":"","book_id":"7174743629074795532","book_name":"黑科技：我继承了全宇宙科技遗产","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#006870","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7174743786625761830","read_count":"26882","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2257079"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"906","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a522a810d5a8f1da4d10cee1b6e3085e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779321856&x-signature=kBcRDibmrWiyaemk4x%2FbD2exq7Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"351473268162846","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"255"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220804161D5177AB95E536BE9464"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":6112,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":44754,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":10498},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1715928240,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_co
